name: Fiendish Magic

prerequisites.name: Grimspawn, Pitborn, Hellspawn, or another lineage feat associated with fiends

description:
You possess fiendish magic. Choose two of the following spells: , , , , , or . You can use each of the chosen spells once per day as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

Grimspawn typically take false vitality and see the unseen, pitborn typically take paranoia and shatter, and hellspawn typically take invisibility and disguise magic.
